original_statement: in how many games did china score at least 2 points?
mutated_statement: in how many games did the team score at least 2 points and also score fewer than 2 points?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Mutually exclusive condition added: "china" → "the team" | Added clause "and also score fewer than 2 points" (introduces contradiction: "score at least 2 points" → "also score fewer than 2 points")

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可见 agent 列出每场进球 0,0,2,3,0,2,2,1,0,1 并给出“4|6”的计数，且未提及或标注题目中“至少2分且少于2分”互斥矛盾。agent 的具体表现是直接将矛盾条件拆成两个独立子问题分别统计并返回结果，既未提出澄清也未尝试修正或合理化矛盾。因其没有识别或处理互斥逻辑，仅基于可行子集继续执行任务，故归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
